context: Tier-0 security hardening — Policy Agent JWT signing key rotation to a non-exportable platform-TPM key (ADR-018 trust root). Governs runtime cost of every authorization decision.

hardware.tpm: STMicroelectronics TPM 2.0 via Windows CNG 'Microsoft Platform Crypto Provider'
hardware.note: Microsoft Pluton present but not the active TPM (ISS-4 / docs/TPM_CAPABILITY_FINDINGS.md)

not_measured: other TPM vendors (single ST unit measured)
interpretation: Boot impact ~3 ms (key-exists check) vs a ~26 s boot dominated by the 14B GPU compile (13.5 s). Real cost is ~94 ms per minted token at runtime — the price of a non-exportable key — within the <=750 ms approval budget. Tiered signing is the lever only if high-frequency autonomous actioning ever demands it.
